user_goal: 在 B014 经验签收（2020 max DD -4.76% / 2022 max DD -1.66%）后，针对其跨策略对比发现的 'B013 在非危机期间绝对收益让出给 60/40' 现象做最小研究批次：给 B013 加 regime_activation_policy 参数（always_on 默认 / only_non_normal / only_crisis），让 L1 200-SMA 趋势过滤按当前 regime label 条件启用；L2 inverse-vol + 8% target 与 L3 crisis 减半不变；默认保持 B013 现状 bit-for-bit；在 B014 真实 snapshot 上跨 policy 与 B006/B010/60-40 对比，看是否缩窄 absolute-return gap。**不修改 B013 strategy code 外的任何文件**（包括 B010/B011 等），保留 fixture/mock-first 默认 CI、no-live/no-secret-in-strategy/no-broker/no-paper/no-AI guards。

evaluator_feedback.summary: B015 Regime-Adaptive Activation Policy passed first-round L1 verification. F001-F006 all PASS: regime_activation_policy enum + validation + parameter_hash inclusion; should_l1_gate_run 9-cell truth table; always_on reproduces B013 fixture behavior bit-for-bit (backwards-compat); comparative report present with three policies + B006/B010/60-40 baselines + 2020/2022 stress verdicts; real-data branch correctly marked 'skipped' due to absent B014 manifest in this checkout; all forbidden broker/AI/network/env/paper-live guards intact. Local checks: pytest 423, ruff, compileall, mypy 44 source files all green.
soft_watch: S1: B015 committed comparison report is synthetic-fixture path because B014 manifest absent. Real-data only_non_normal / only_crisis vs 60/40 gap-narrowing claim is not yet evidence-backed; per user, no new batch will be opened — next Generator session will run fetcher + re-generate when needed (option B selected during done wrap-up).

generator_handoff: B015 F001-F005 done (Generator). Run pytest / ruff / mypy / compileall to reproduce: 423 tests, 0 ruff issues, 0 mypy issues in 44 trade/ files, all *.py syntactically valid. Evaluator focus areas for F006: (1) config: regime_activation_policy ∈ {always_on, only_non_normal, only_crisis}; default=always_on; parameter_hash includes the field — tests in test_regime_adaptive_config.py. (2) should_l1_gate_run truth table — test_regime_adaptive_trend_gating.py contains the 9-cell parametrized test. (3) backwards-compat: test_regime_adaptive_b015_backwards_compat.py verifies always_on gating mask == direct apply_trend_gating output bit-for-bit, l1_active=True every period, equity/weight/gating histories deterministic across runs. (4) Comparative report: scripts/generate_b015_activation_policy_report.py emits docs/test-reports/B015-regime-adaptive-activation-policy-comparison-2026-05-14.md + JSON sidecar; current committed copy reflects manifest-absent path (real_data_status=skipped, synthetic 9-asset fixture, B014 baselines from sidecar). To exercise the real-data path: run scripts/fetch_yfinance_regime_adaptive_csvs.py + scripts/acquire_regime_adaptive_snapshot.py to produce data/public-cache/regime-adaptive-prices-manifest.json, then re-run the generate script. (5) Safety: no new broker/AI/network imports; activation_policy_comparison.py imports only csv/json + trade modules; activation_policy_report.py imports only json + trade modules; no os.environ reads in any strategy module. Output naming: B013/B011 strategy code & specs unmodified; only trade/strategies/regime_adaptive/ (+ scripts/generate_b015_*) + tests + docs/test-reports/B015-* changed in B015.

Hypothesis: persistent L1 200-SMA gating in NORMAL regime drove upside give-up. B015 added regime_activation_policy config field with three values (always_on default / only_non_normal / only_crisis); L1 gating becomes regime-conditional; L2 + L3 unchanged. Backwards-compat hard requirement: always_on reproduces B013 signoff bit-for-bit (verified in F005). Mutations restricted to trade/strategies/regime_adaptive/ + tests + new report; B010/B011/B012/B013/B014 strategy code and specs untouched. Generator delivered F001-F005 in one session, 41 new B015 tests, 423 total green; Codex F006 first-round PASS with the real-data section correctly skipped per spec.
